operator_instruction: you do it for me i dont have time for that shit

anti_criteria_honored.A-4_no_auto_funding_inference: every funding_breakdown has a source_url; sources without owner match get funding_breakdown=null with audit note
anti_criteria_honored.A-5_no_aggregator_only_primary: primary_source_url is the outlet's own RSS or homepage, not Wikipedia/AllSides
anti_criteria_honored.ISC-56_provenance_per_source: every source has provenance_mbfc or provenance_allsides or operator_curated=True
